card.flavor: As it twists, so does all life around it.

oracleCard.name: The Ozolith
oracleCard.text:
Whenever a creature you control leaves the battlefield, if it had counters on it, put those counters on The Ozolith.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, if The Ozolith has counters on it, you may move all counters from The Ozolith onto target creature.

card.flavor: Its graceful glide paints the ocean floor with strokes of luminescence.

oracleCard.name: Deepglow Skate
oracleCard.text: When this creature enters, double the number of each kind of counter on any number of target permanents.

oracleCard.name: Myojin of Cryptic Dreams
oracleCard.text:
Myojin of Cryptic Dreams enters with an indestructible counter on it if you cast it from your hand.
Remove an indestructible counter from Myojin of Cryptic Dreams: Copy target permanent spell you control three times. (The copies become tokens.)

oracleCard.name: Hallowed Fountain
oracleCard.text:
({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

oracleCard.name: Overgrown Tomb
oracleCard.text:
({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.flavor:
"New Vegas is more than a city—it's the remedy to mankind's derailment."
—Mr. House

oracleCard.name: Command Tower
oracleCard.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

oracleCard.name: Savannah
oracleCard.text: ({T}: Add {G} or {W}.)

card.flavor:
"These lowlands were formed thousands of years ago by the behemoth Indath—its final footsteps before vanishing into the sea."
—*Tales of the Ozolith*

oracleCard.name: Indatha Triome
oracleCard.text:
({T}: Add {W}, {B}, or {G}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.flavor: Hunters in the primeval wetlands become fluent in reading the ripples to tell when to pursue and when to flee.

oracleCard.name: Zagoth Triome
oracleCard.text:
({T}: Add {B}, {G}, or {U}.)
This land enters tapped.
Cycling {3} ({3}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.flavor:
"Log 1.4.778: Granove, a tropical moon teeming with endemic biota. A must see for any aspiring astrobiologist!"
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*

oracleCard.name: Breeding Pool
oracleCard.text:
({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

oracleCard.text: ({T}: Add {B} or {G}.)

oracleCard.text: ({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)

oracleCard.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)

edition.editionname: Commander Legends: Battle for Baldur's Gate

card.flavor: Gale stared into the pool and saw a stranger. The similarities were uncanny, but it was not him.

oracleCard.name: Reflecting Pool
oracleCard.text: {T}: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce.

oracleCard.name: Rupture Spire
oracleCard.text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

oracleCard.name: Rite of Replication
oracleCard.text:
Kicker {5} (You may pay an additional {5} as you cast this spell.)
Create a token that's a copy of target creature. If this spell was kicked, create five of those tokens instead.

card.flavor: Sometimes restoring the lost archives of the Jeskai can be as simple as the quiet ruffle of pages and the smell of fresh ink.

oracleCard.name: Arcane Signet
oracleCard.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

oracleCard.name: Thrummingbird
oracleCard.text:
Flying
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

oracleCard.name: Doubling Season
oracleCard.text:
If an effect would create one or more tokens under your control, it creates twice that many of those tokens instead.
If an effect would put one or more counters on a permanent you control, it puts twice that many of those counters on that permanent instead.

card.flavor: All seeds share a common bond, calling to each other across infinity.

oracleCard.name: Cultivate
oracleCard.text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, reveal those cards, put one onto the battlefield tapped and the other into your hand, then shuffle.

oracleCard.name: Contagion Engine
oracleCard.text:
When this artifact enters, put a -1/-1 counter on each creature target player controls.
{4}, {T}: Proliferate twice. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there. Then do it again.)

edition.editionname: The Lost Caverns of Ixalan Commander

card.flavor:
"I can't protect everyone here. But those I can, I will."
—Karn

oracleCard.name: Karn's Bastion
oracleCard.text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{4}, {T}: Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.flavor: Tomorrow belongs to those who prepare for it today.

oracleCard.name: Ponder
oracleCard.text:
Look at the top three cards of your library, then put them back in any order. You may shuffle.
Draw a card.

oracleCard.name: Atraxa, Praetors' Voice
oracleCard.text:
Flying, vigilance, deathtouch, lifelink
At the beginning of your end step, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

oracleCard.name: Roalesk, Apex Hybrid
oracleCard.text:
Flying, trample
When Roalesk enters, put two +1/+1 counters on another target creature you control.
When Roalesk dies, proliferate, then proliferate again. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there. Then do it again.)

card.flavor: "Inform our allies in the Tenth and throw the circuit. It's about to get weird."

oracleCard.name: Flux Channeler
oracleCard.text: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

oracleCard.name: Yawgmoth, Thran Physician
oracleCard.text:
Protection from Humans
Pay 1 life, Sacrifice another creature: Put a -1/-1 counter on up to one target creature and draw a card.
{B}{B}, Discard a card: Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.flavor: "I am no sleeper agent. I am a liberator. It is you who are asleep."

oracleCard.name: Metastatic Evangel
oracleCard.text: Whenever another nontoken creature you control enters, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.flavor: Its blood is life. Its body is growth.

oracleCard.name: Forgotten Ancient
oracleCard.text:
Whenever a player casts a spell, you may put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may move any number of +1/+1 counters from this creature onto other creatures.

card.flavor: "The arc of my blade has carved a path of light for the peace that will follow."

oracleCard.name: Swords to Plowshares
oracleCard.text: Exile target creature. Its controller gains life equal to its power.

card.flavor:
"I'll teach you the leyline paratrigonometrics, no problem. But you need to show me how to make that fiery swirly thing."
—Zimone, to Rootha

oracleCard.name: Rhystic Study
oracleCard.text: Whenever an opponent casts a spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays {1}.

oracleCard.name: Mystic Remora
oracleCard.text:
Cumulative upkeep {1} (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this permanent, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.)
Whenever an opponent casts a noncreature spell, you may draw a card unless that player pays {4}.

card.flavor: From the cracks in the stone, she reads stories of the past. From the swirling vines, she glimpses visions of the future.

oracleCard.name: Nature's Lore
oracleCard.text: Search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

oracleCard.name: Teferi's Protection
oracleCard.text:
Until your next turn, your life total can't change and you gain protection from everything. All permanents you control phase out. (While they're phased out, they're treated as though they don't exist. They phase in before you untap during your untap step.)
Exile Teferi's Protection.

card.flavor: The more Esper changes, the more he refuses to.

oracleCard.name: Esper Sentinel
oracleCard.text: Whenever an opponent casts their first noncreature spell each turn, draw a card unless that player pays {X}, where X is this creature's power.

card.flavor: Leonos had no second thoughts about the abolishment edict. He'd left skyrunes warning of the eviction, even though it was cloudy.

oracleCard.name: Supreme Verdict
oracleCard.text:
This spell can't be countered.
Destroy all creatures.

card.flavor: The Izzet specialize in unnatural disaster.

oracleCard.name: Cyclonic Rift
oracleCard.text:
Return target nonland permanent you don't control to its owner's hand.
Overload {6}{U} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

card.flavor:
"Without the kami to speak to nature on our behalf, we must beg help from nature directly."
—Seshiro the Anointed

oracleCard.name: Nature's Will
oracleCard.text: Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, tap all lands that player controls and untap all lands you control.

card.flavor: Eumidians live to change and be changed, ever increasing the complexity of the Edge. Each new world is a new perspective.

oracleCard.name: Farseek
oracleCard.text: Search your library for a Plains, Island, Swamp, or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.flavor:
"The timeless, tireless jaws of nature shall one day devour us all."
—Sildark, artificer of Omu

oracleCard.name: Nature's Claim
oracleCard.text: Destroy target artifact or enchantment. Its controller gains 4 life.

card.flavor: In the end, the dying Illvoi clung to neither secrecy nor protocol. She cloudsculpted wings that she might live on in a spark of creativity.

oracleCard.name: Swan Song
oracleCard.text: Counter target enchantment, instant, or sorcery spell. Its controller creates a 2/2 blue Bird creature token with flying.

card.flavor: Despite all the differences between the Edge and the Multiverse, people still spoke the language of greed.

oracleCard.name: Tezzeret's Gambit
oracleCard.text:
({U/P} can be paid with either {U} or 2 life.)
Draw two cards, then proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.flavor:
"Under the suns, Mirrodin kneels and begs us for perfection."
—Geth, Lord of the Vault

oracleCard.name: Black Sun's Zenith
oracleCard.text: Put X -1/-1 counters on each creature. Shuffle Black Sun's Zenith into its owner's library.

card.flavor: "To care for yourself, cultivate the world. To care for the world, cultivate yourself."

oracleCard.name: Evolution Sage
oracleCard.text: Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

card.flavor:
"When Sin attacked Zanarkand that day, I woke up in Spira."
—Tidus

oracleCard.name: Inexorable Tide
oracleCard.text: Whenever you cast a spell, proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)

oracleCard.name: Tekuthal, Inquiry Dominus
oracleCard.text:
Flying
If you would proliferate, proliferate twice instead.
{1}{U/P}{U/P}, Remove three counters from among other artifacts, creatures, and planeswalkers you control: Put an indestructible counter on Tekuthal. ({U/P} can be paid with either {U} or 2 life.)

card.flavor: Niv-Mizzet had perfected a plan, but he had no control over the mortal minds who had to agree to implement it.

oracleCard.name: Contentious Plan
oracleCard.text:
Proliferate. (Choose any number of permanents and/or players, then give each another counter of each kind already there.)
Draw a card.

oracleCard.name: Incubation Druid
oracleCard.text:
{T}: Add one mana of any type that a land you control could produce. If this creature has a +1/+1 counter on it, add three mana of that type instead.
{3}{G}{G}: Adapt 3. (If this creature has no +1/+1 counters on it, put three +1/+1 counters on it.)

card.flavor: Long ago, birds of paradise littered the skies. Thanks to the city's sprawl, most now exist as pets of society's elite.

oracleCard.name: Birds of Paradise
oracleCard.text:
Flying
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.flavor:
"I await your donation."
—Dasha, Orzhov priest

oracleCard.name: Smothering Tithe
oracleCard.text: Whenever an opponent draws a card, that player may pay {2}. If the player doesn't, you create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.flavor:
"She speaks with the purity of nature and walks with the boldness of the wilds. She is a reminder of a world untamed."
—Kamahl, druid acolyte

oracleCard.name: Seedborn Muse
oracleCard.text: Untap all permanents you control during each other player's untap step.

card.flavor: Brave soldier boy comes marching home.

oracleCard.name: Bastion of Remembrance
oracleCard.text:
When this enchantment enters, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token.
Whenever a creature you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.flavor: Beware the generosity of demons.

oracleCard.name: Demonic Tutor
oracleCard.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, then shuffle.

card.flavor: True power is achieved through blood and sweat. But mostly blood.

oracleCard.name: Vampiric Tutor
oracleCard.text: Search your library for a card, then shuffle and put that card on top. You lose 2 life.

oracleCard.name: Mana Vault
oracleCard.text:
This artifact doesn't untap during your untap step.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may pay {4}. If you do, untap this artifact.
At the beginning of your draw step, if this artifact is tapped, it deals 1 damage to you.
{T}: Add {C}{C}{C}.

card.flavor:
"Yawgmoth's corpse is a wound in the universe. His foul blood seeps out, infecting the land with his final curse."
—Lord Windgrace

oracleCard.name: Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth
oracleCard.text: Each land is a Swamp in addition to its other land types.

oracleCard.name: Vorinclex, Monstrous Raider
oracleCard.text:
Trample, haste
If you would put one or more counters on a permanent or player, put twice that many of each of those kinds of counters on that permanent or player instead.
If an opponent would put one or more counters on a permanent or player, they put half that many of each of those kinds of counters on that permanent or player instead, rounded down.

card.flavor:
"Naga shed their scales. We wear ours with pride."
—Golran, dragonscale captain

oracleCard.name: Hardened Scales
oracleCard.text: If one or more +1/+1 counters would be put on a creature you control, that many plus one +1/+1 counters are put on it instead.

oracleCard.name: Elesh Norn, Mother of Machines
oracleCard.text:
Vigilance
If a permanent entering causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
Permanents entering don't cause abilities of permanents your opponents control to trigger.

oracleCard.name: Teferi, Master of Time
oracleCard.text:
You may activate loyalty abilities of Teferi on any player's turn any time you could cast an instant.
+1: Draw a card, then discard a card.
−3: Target creature you don't control phases out. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)
−10: Take two extra turns after this one.

card.flavor:
"I beat you all before and I'll do it again!"
—Toph

oracleCard.name: Dramatic Reversal
oracleCard.text: Untap all nonland permanents you control.

card.flavor:
"Unskin these impure bodies, Great Yawgmoth, that the flesh may welcome your blessings."
—*Phyrexian Scriptures*

oracleCard.name: Phyrexian Altar
oracleCard.text: Sacrifice a creature: Add one mana of any color.

card.flavor:
"Log 2.9.089: Lammuat, the cemetery moon of salvage and secrets. Could be profitable for those brave enough to plumb its recesses."
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*

oracleCard.name: Watery Grave
oracleCard.text:
({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

oracleCard.name: Yawgmoth's Will
oracleCard.text:
Until end of turn, you may play lands and cast spells from your graveyard.
If a card would be put into your graveyard from anywhere this turn, exile that card instead.

oracleCard.name: Isochron Scepter
oracleCard.text:
Imprint — When this artifact enters, you may exile an instant card with mana value 2 or less from your hand.
{2}, {T}: You may copy the exiled card. If you do, you may cast the copy without paying its mana cost.

oracleCard.name: Atraxa, Grand Unifier
oracleCard.text:
Flying, vigilance, deathtouch, lifelink
When Atraxa enters, reveal the top ten cards of your library. For each card type, you may put a card of that type from among the revealed cards into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Artifact, battle, creature, enchantment, instant, land, planeswalker, and sorcery are card types.)

oracleCard.name: Thassa's Oracle
oracleCard.text: When this creature enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is your devotion to blue. Put up to one of them on top of your library and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. If X is greater than or equal to the number of cards in your library, you win the game. (Each {U} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to blue.)

card.flavor: Enthusiasm is no match for preparation.

oracleCard.name: Mana Drain
oracleCard.text: Counter target spell. At the beginning of your next main phase, add an amount of {C} equal to that spell's mana value.

oracleCard.name: Demonic Consultation
oracleCard.text: Choose a card name. Exile the top six cards of your library, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a card with the chosen name. Put that card into your hand and exile all other cards revealed this way.

oracleCard.name: Preordain
oracleCard.text: Scry 2, then draw a card. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

oracleCard.name: Necropotence
oracleCard.text:
Skip your draw step.
Whenever you discard a card, exile that card from your graveyard.
Pay 1 life: Exile the top card of your library face down. Put that card into your hand at the beginning of your next end step.

oracleCard.name: Mox Diamond
oracleCard.text:
If this artifact would enter, you may discard a land card instead. If you do, put this artifact onto the battlefield. If you don't, put it into its owner's graveyard.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.flavor: "Your artillery will burn itself out before I allow my focus to waver."

oracleCard.name: Force of Will
oracleCard.text:
You may pay 1 life and exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spell's mana cost.
Counter target spell.

card.flavor: Mages and warriors recruited from across Kylem display their skills at Valor's Reach.

oracleCard.name: Spellseeker
oracleCard.text: When this creature enters, you may search your library for an instant or sorcery card with mana value 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

oracleCard.name: Intuition
oracleCard.text: Search your library for three cards and reveal them. Target opponent chooses one. Put that card into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Then shuffle.

oracleCard.name: Lim-Dûl's Vault
oracleCard.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. As many times as you choose, you may pay 1 life, put those cards on the bottom of your library in any order, then look at the top five cards of your library. Then shuffle and put the last cards you looked at this way on top in any order.
